verses.latin_vulgate: Et levavi oculos meos, et vidi, et ecce vir, et in manu ejus funiculus mensorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶשָּׂ֥א עֵינַ֛י וָאֵ֖רֶא וְהִנֵּה־אִ֑ישׁ וּבְיָד֖וֹ חֶ֥בֶל מִדָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I lifted up my eyes, and saw, and behold a man, with a measuring line in his hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä nostin silmäni ja näin, ja katso, miehen kädessä oli mittanuora.
verses.king_james: I lifted up mine eyes again, and looked, and behold a man with a measuring line in his hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi : Quo tu vadis ? Et dixit ad me : Ut metiar Jerusalem, et videam quanta sit latitudo ejus, et quanta longitudo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֕ר אָ֖נָה אַתָּ֣ה הֹלֵ֑ךְ וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלַ֗י לָמֹד֙ אֶת־יְר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם לִרְא֥וֹת כַּמָּֽה־רׇחְבָּ֖הּ וְכַמָּ֥ה אׇרְכָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said: Whither goest thou? and he said to me: To measure Jerusalem, and to see how great is the breadth thereof, and how great the length thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä sanoin: kuhunkas menet? Mutta hän sanoi minulle: mittaamaan Jerusalemia, ja katsomaan, kuinka pitkä ja leviä se on oleva.
verses.king_james: Then said I, Whither goest thou? And he said unto me, To measure Jerusalem, to see what is the breadth thereof, and what is the length thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ecce angelus qui loquebatur in me egrediebatur, et angelus alius egrediebatur in occursum ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִנֵּ֗ה הַמַּלְאָ֛ךְ הַדֹּבֵ֥ר בִּ֖י יֹצֵ֑א וּמַלְאָ֣ךְ אַחֵ֔ר יֹצֵ֖א לִקְרָאתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And behold the angel that spoke in me went forth, and another angel went out to meet him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja katso, enkeli, joka puhui minun kanssani, läksi ulos, ja toinen enkeli meni häntä vastaan,
verses.king_james: And, behold, the angel that talked with me went forth, and another angel went out to meet him,

verses.latin_vulgate: et dixit ad eum : Curre, loquere ad puerum istum, dicens : Absque muro habitabitur Jerusalem, præ multitudine hominum et jumentorum in medio ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֵלָ֔ו רֻ֗ץ דַּבֵּ֛ר אֶל־הַנַּ֥עַר הַלָּ֖ז לֵאמֹ֑ר פְּרָזוֹת֙ תֵּשֵׁ֣ב יְרוּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם מֵרֹ֥ב אָדָ֛ם וּבְהֵמָ֖ה בְּתוֹכָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to him: Run, speak to this young man, saying: Jerusalem shall be inhabited without walls, by reason of the multitude of men, and of the beasts in the midst thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi hänelle: juokse tuonne, ja puhu sille pojalle ja sano: Jerusalemissa pitää ilman muureja asuttaman, ihmisten ja karjan paljouden tähden, joka siinä oleva on.
verses.king_james: And said unto him, Run, speak to this young man, saying, Jerusalem shall be inhabited as towns without walls for the multitude of men and cattle therein:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego ero ei, ait Dominus, murus ignis in circuitu, et in gloria ero in medio ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י אֶֽהְיֶה־לָּהּ֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה ח֥וֹמַת אֵ֖שׁ סָבִ֑יב וּלְכָב֖וֹד אֶהְיֶ֥ה בְתוֹכָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And I will be to it, saith the Lord, a wall of fire round about: and I will be in glory in the midst thereof.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä tahdon olla, sanoo Herra, tulinen muuri hänen ympärillänsä, ja tahdon itse olla kunniaksi hänen keskellänsä.
verses.king_james: For I, saith the Lord, will be unto her a wall of fire round about, and will be the glory in the midst of her.

verses.latin_vulgate: O, o, fugite de terra aquilonis, dicit Dominus,  quoniam in quatuor ventos cæli dispersi vos, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֣וֹי ה֗וֹי וְנֻ֛סוּ מֵאֶ֥רֶץ צָפ֖וֹן נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֠י כְּאַרְבַּ֞ע רוּח֧וֹת הַשָּׁמַ֛יִם פֵּרַ֥שְׂתִּי אֶתְכֶ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: O, O flee ye out of the land of the north, saith the Lord, for I have scattered you into the four winds of heaven, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hoi! hoi! paetkaat pohjan maasta, sanoo Herra; sillä minä hajoitin teitä neljään tuuleen taivaan alla, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: Ho, ho, come forth, and flee from the land of the north, saith the Lord: for I have spread you abroad as the four winds of the heaven, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: O Sion ! fuge, quæ habitas apud filiam Babylonis :
verses.douay_rheims: O Sion, flee, thou that dwellest with the daughter of Babylon:
verses.finnish_biblia: Hoi Zion, joka asut Babelin tyttären tykönä! pelasta sinus.
verses.king_james: Deliver thyself, O Zion, that dwellest with the daughter of Babylon.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia hæc dicit Dominus exercituum :  Post gloriam misit me ad gentes quæ spoliaverunt vos :  qui enim tetigerit vos, tangit pupillam oculi mei :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י כֹ֣ה אָמַר֮ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָאוֹת֒ אַחַ֣ר כָּב֔וֹד שְׁלָחַ֕נִי אֶל־הַגּוֹיִ֖ם הַשֹּׁלְלִ֣ים אֶתְכֶ֑ם כִּ֚י הַנֹּגֵ֣עַ בָּכֶ֔ם נֹגֵ֖עַ בְּבָבַ֥ת עֵינֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thus saith the Lord of hosts: After the glory he hath sent me to the nations that have robbed you: for he that toucheth you, toucheth the apple of my eye:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä näin sanoo Herra Zebaot: joka sen (ilmoitetun) kunnian jälkeen lähetti minun niiden pakanain tykö, jotka teitä raatelivat: joka teihin rupee, se rupee hänen silmänsä terään.
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord of hosts; After the glory hath he sent me unto the nations which spoiled you: for he that toucheth you toucheth the apple of his eye.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia ecce ego levo manum meam super eos,  et erunt prædæ his qui serviebant sibi :  et cognoscetis quia Dominus exercituum misit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֠י הִנְנִ֨י מֵנִ֤יף אֶת־יָדִי֙ עֲלֵיהֶ֔ם וְהָי֥וּ שָׁלָ֖ל לְעַבְדֵיהֶ֑ם וִֽידַעְתֶּ֕ם כִּֽי־יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת שְׁלָחָֽנִי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For behold, I lift up my hand upon them, and they shall be a prey to those that served them: and you shall know that the Lord of hosts sent me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä katso, minä nostan käteni heidän ylitsensä, että heidän pitää oleman niille saaliiksi, jotka ennen heitä palvelivat; että teidän pitää ymmärtämän Herran Zebaotin minua lähettäneeksi.
verses.king_james: For, behold, I will shake mine hand upon them, and they shall be a spoil to their servants: and ye shall know that the Lord of hosts hath sent me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lauda et lætare, filia Sion, quia ecce ego venio,  et habitabo in medio tui, ait Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רׇנִּ֥י וְשִׂמְחִ֖י בַּת־צִיּ֑וֹן כִּ֧י הִנְנִי־בָ֛א וְשָׁכַנְתִּ֥י בְתוֹכֵ֖ךְ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sing praise, and rejoice, O daughter of Sion: for behold I come, and I will dwell in the midst of thee: saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisaa ja riemuitse, Zionin tytär; sillä katso, minä tulen ja tahdon asua sinun tykönäs, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Zion: for, lo, I come, and I will dwell in the midst of thee, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et applicabuntur gentes multæ ad Dominum in die illa,  et erunt mihi in populum,  et habitabo in medio tui :  et scies quia Dominus exercituum misit me ad te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנִלְווּ֩ גוֹיִ֨ם רַבִּ֤ים אֶל־יְהֹוָה֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא וְהָ֥יוּ לִ֖י לְעָ֑ם וְשָׁכַנְתִּ֣י בְתוֹכֵ֔ךְ וְיָדַ֕עַתְּ כִּי־יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת שְׁלָחַ֥נִי אֵלָֽיִךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And many nations shall be joined to the Lord in that day, and they shall be my people, and I will dwell in the midst of thee: and thou shalt know that the Lord of hosts hath sent me to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin pitää paljon pakanoita Herrassa kiinni riippuman, jotka minun kansani pitää oleman: ja minä tahdon asua sinun tykönäs, ettäs ymmärtäisit Herran Zebaotin lähettäneen minun sinun tykös.
verses.king_james: And many nations shall be joined to the Lord in that day, and shall be my people: and I will dwell in the midst of thee, and thou shalt know that the Lord of hosts hath sent me unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et possidebit Dominus Judam partem suam in terra sanctificata,  et eliget adhuc Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָחַ֨ל יְהֹוָ֤ה אֶת־יְהוּדָה֙ חֶלְק֔וֹ עַ֖ל אַדְמַ֣ת הַקֹּ֑דֶשׁ וּבָחַ֥ר ע֖וֹד בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord shall possess Juda his portion in the sanctified land: and he shall yet choose Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra on perivä Juudan osaksensa siinä pyhässä maassa, ja on taas Jerusalemin valitseva.
verses.king_james: And the Lord shall inherit Judah his portion in the holy land, and shall choose Jerusalem again.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sileat omnis caro a facie Domini,  quia consurrexit de habitaculo sancto suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥ס כׇּל־בָּשָׂ֖ר מִפְּנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֥י נֵע֖וֹר מִמְּע֥וֹן קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Let all flesh be silent at the presence of the Lord: for he is risen up out of his holy habitation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaijetkoon kaikki liha Herran edessä; sillä hän on noussut pyhästä asuinsiastansa.
verses.king_james: Be silent, O all flesh, before the Lord: for he is raised up out of his holy habitation.
